title: Distribute to survivors via partner; record attested usefulness outcomes (de-identified)
context: The closing deed for ewing-survivorship-late-effects: dual-signed content reaches real survivors/families through the secured partner and attested usefulness outcomes are recorded de-identified (no PII). HIGH risk-tier; the no-advice framing, both sign-offs, and all guardrails are verified throughout. Gated on the secured partner from task 019.
objective: Distribute the dual-signed content to survivors via the partner and record de-identified attested usefulness outcomes.
acceptanceCriteria: Reviewed content reaches real survivors/families through the partner; >=1 attested instance of a survivor/caregiver using it to understand or prepare for survivorship care (de-identified, anonymous feedback, no PII)
No-advice framing upheld; both sign-offs and guardrails verified throughout
Outcomes recorded de-identified (reach + attested usefulness, not engagement analytics)
